name: Priya Sharma
text: The Biscoff Brownie is unlike anything I've had. Dense, fudgy, with that caramel Biscoff swirl — I ordered twice in the same week. Banoffee is genuinely the best bakery in Bengaluru.

name: Arjun Mehta
text: Ordered a custom chocolate truffle cake for our anniversary. The presentation was stunning and the taste was even better. You can feel the care and love that goes into every layer.

name: Sneha Iyer
text: The Basque Cheesecake is perfection — that creamy, slightly wobbly center with the burnt caramel top is exactly how it should be. Finally found a bakery that actually gets it right.

name: Rahul Nair
text: What struck me first was the story behind the brand. Then the Banoffee Pie arrived and I understood completely — this is a bakery with a soul. Every bite genuinely carries a story.

name: Kavya Reddy
text: The Classic Tiramisu is my weakness. Light mascarpone, perfectly soaked ladyfingers, just the right bitterness from the espresso. I bring a box to every dinner party and it disappears instantly.
